scripts.test: pnpm --filter @genui/protocol test && pnpm --filter @genui/genui test && pnpm --filter @genui/playground test
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm --filter @genui/protocol check && pnpm --filter @genui/genui check && pnpm --filter @genui/playground check
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @genui/protocol typecheck && pnpm --filter @genui/genui typecheck && pnpm --filter @genui/playground typecheck
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @genui/protocol lint && pnpm --filter @genui/genui lint && pnpm --filter @genui/playground lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm --filter @genui/protocol lint:fix && pnpm --filter @genui/genui lint:fix && pnpm --filter @genui/playground lint:fix
scripts.format: oxfmt package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json packages/protocol/package.json packages/protocol/tsconfig.json packages/protocol/src packages/runtime/package.json packages/runtime/tsconfig.json packages/runtime/src examples/playground/package.json examples/playground/tsconfig.json examples/playground/src examples/playground/scripts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json packages/protocol/package.json packages/protocol/tsconfig.json packages/protocol/src packages/runtime/package.json packages/runtime/tsconfig.json packages/runtime/src examples/playground/package.json examples/playground/tsconfig.json examples/playground/src examples/playground/scripts
